authority_basis: Taylor clarified no scolding or hostile behavior is allowed ever.
HoloChat QA blocked HOLOCHAT_GOV_KERNEL_AUTHORITY_REPAIR_V0 for remaining visible-output and Gov-to-worker tone risks.
QA mapped the Constitution pattern lesson to HoloChat: intended character must be explicit, final authority, and tested against real prompt/output behavior.
HoloBrain memory is continuity grounding only and must never become accusatory theory about Randall.

blocker_summary.gov_to_worker_prompt: CAPTAIN BRIEF and Gov doctrine could still steer workers toward pressure/gotcha posture.
blocker_summary.deterministic_guard: Literal term matching did not catch subtler hostile posture.
blocker_summary.streaming: Raw stream chunks could be yielded before visible-release repair.
blocker_summary.surface_thought: Provider/advisor surface_thought metadata could become UI-visible without deterministic admission.
blocker_summary.memory: Capsule/HoloBrain context needed an explicit constitutional use boundary.

repair_summary: Added a shared provider-free HoloChat constitutional tone law module.
Injected the constitutional law into worker prompt and Gov prompt surfaces.
Rewrote Gov chat doctrine and Gov-generated brief/path wording from push/pressure to warm precision.
Strengthened deterministic admission to catch hostile posture patterns and not echo hostile text during repair.
Added deterministic admission for surface_thought metadata before UI exposure.
Converted streaming release to a gated stream: provider chunks are buffered and only admitted text is yielded.
Added tests proving prompt constitution, Gov brief law, hostile-output repair, streaming gate, thought blocking, and HoloBrain memory grounding.
